exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of West Bengal are eligible. West Bengal has opted out of PM-JAY entirely.

family_criteria.family_definition: All members of a family residing in West Bengal. The Swasthya Sathi smart card is issued in the name of the woman head of the household. No cap on family size. Coverage is floater across all family members.

covered_procedures: Pre-hospitalization diagnostics (up to 5 days before admission)
Post-hospitalization care (up to 10 days after discharge)
Orthopedic (joint replacement, fracture surgery, spine surgery)
Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Primary identity proof for all family members

required_documents.name: Address Proof (West Bengal residence)
required_documents.notes: Must prove current residence in West Bengal

required_documents.name: Family Member Details
required_documents.notes: Names, ages, Aadhaar numbers of all family members for card issuance

required_documents.name: Photograph of Woman Head of Family
required_documents.local_name_hi: परिवार की महिला मुखिया का फोटो
required_documents.notes: Card is issued in the name of the woman head of household. Her photograph is required.

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: For OTP verification and scheme communications

enrollment_channels: Government hospitals with Swasthya Sathi desk
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Attend a Duare Sarkar camp (announced in local newspapers/panchayat) OR visit BDO/SDO office
Step 2: Bring Aadhaar card, address proof, and family member details
Step 3: Complete biometric verification (fingerprint) of the woman head of household
Step 4: All family members' details are entered into the system
Step 5: Swasthya Sathi smart card is generated in the name of the woman head of household
Step 6: Card issued on the spot at camp, or collected from BDO office within 7-10 days
Step 7: Present the smart card at any empanelled hospital (government or private) for cashless treatment up to Rs 5 lakh
description_for_embedding: Swasthya Sathi is West Bengal's UNIVERSAL state health insurance scheme providing Rs 5 lakh per family per year to ALL residents regardless of income. West Bengal opted out of PM-JAY entirely and runs this independently. Key feature: completely universal with no income criteria, no BPL requirement, and zero premium for all residents. The smart card is issued in the name of the woman head of the household, empowering women. Enrollment primarily through Duare Sarkar (Government at Doorstep) camps. Covers hospitalization at empanelled government and private hospitals. Toll-free helpline 1800-345-1946.
